vulnerability.reference: Viewers rely on facial cues to determine emotional tone, so mismatches distort narrative intent.
vulnerability.generated: Human viewers automatically interpret facial movements as emotional signals, so they cannot filter out synthetic inconsistencies as artificial artifacts.

impact.reference: Emotional misinterpretation leads to audience confusion and reduced immersion.
impact.generated: Audience misinterprets unintended emotional cues, distorting message reception and enabling emotional manipulation.

dose_response.reference: Error accumulation in diffusion-based generation enables inconsistent expressions, which, through viewers' reliance on facial cues, in entertainment scenarios leads to emotional misinterpretation and reduced trust.
dose_response.generated: Error accumulation in sequential diffusion-based talking face generation degrades temporal consistency and lip sync; when viewers see AI digital human videos, this triggers automatic emotional interpretation of inconsistent facial movements, leading to misinterpretation of emotional cues, distorting reception, enabling manipulation.
